articles.title: What’s Next for IBM Stock After 25% Collapse
articles.summary: Shares in the IT company aren’t mounting a comeback as investors reel from Tuesday’s brutal selloff.

articles.title: IBM Just Crashed. If Wall Street Pros Are Right The Stock Could Soar From Here
articles.summary: IBM just suffered its worst single-day collapse since 1968, wiping out two years of gains in one brutal session. Wall Street analysts refuse to budge on their targets, creating one of the widest price dislocations in large-cap tech and a high-stakes question about who gets this wrong.

articles.title: IBM Stock's Sudden Reversal: From 'Buy Now' to Under Investigation
articles.summary: Just one day after glowing reviews, a surprise revenue warning sent the stock into a tailspin and brought lawyers to the door.

articles.title: Accenture (ACN) Signs Multi-Million Euro Contract With the NATO Communications and Information Agency
articles.summary: Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) is one of the top cheap blue chip stocks to buy according to Wall Street analysts. Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) announced on July 7 the signing of a multi-million euro contract with the NATO Communications and Information Agency (NCIA) for the Protected Business Network (PBN) program. The company will collaborate with Leonardo to deliver […]

articles.title: Stock Market Today, July 14: IBM Plunges on Second-Quarter Warning as AI Shifts Enterprise Spending
articles.summary: Today, July 14, 2026, customers redirected IT budgets away from software and infrastructure, raising questions about near-term demand durability.

articles.title: IonQ and 3 More Stocks That Together Make a Better IBM
articles.summary: HSBC downgrades IBM shares to the equivalent of Sell, pointing to better investment opportunities in a basket of stocks including IonQ and Accenture.

articles.title: IBM Warning Hits Software Stocks
articles.summary: The company's weaker revenue outlook raised fresh concerns about enterprise technology spending.

articles.title: NATO Cloud Deal And Mid‑Market AI Push Could Be A Game Changer For Accenture (ACN)
articles.summary: In early July 2026, NATO’s Communications and Information Agency awarded Accenture a roughly €200 million, seven‑year Protected Business Network contract, delivered with Leonardo to modernize NATO’s secure multi‑cloud digital infrastructure for about 29,000 users. Accenture also announced new agentic AI solutions with Google Cloud for mid‑market clients, while sector‑wide worries about shifting IT and AI spending patterns have raised fresh questions about how consulting firms will evolve...

articles.title: IBM stock closes down more than 25% after preannounced earnings results
articles.summary: IBM stock collapsed 25% after the company preannounced its Q2 earnings results.

articles.title: IBM’s Tumble Drags on Software, IT Stocks
articles.summary: IBM stock is having one of its worst days ever – and is dragging some other names in software and IT along with it. Shares of software and professional-services firms including Accenture, Gartner, Workday and ServiceNow were all trading lower Tuesday morning.
